Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 7 days.
For units more than 10% of the investments, an exit load of 1% if redeemed within 12 months.
Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 7 days.
Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
Groww Multi Asset Allocation Fund Direct Growth
Prior to joining the Groww MF, he was associated with ASK Investment Managers, Kotak Investment Advisors Ltd.
Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth is a Hybrid Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008. Anupam Tiwari is the Current Fund Manager of Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Man
Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth is a Hybrid Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008. Anupam Tiwari is the Current Fund Manager of Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,262 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Mar 2026 is ₹22.99.
The Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹500. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 7 days.
Investment Objective
The Scheme seeks to generate periodic return and long term capital appreciation from a judicious mix of equity and debt instruments.
Fund benchmark
investment objective and risk tolerance

The Groww Aggressive Hybrid Fund Direct Growth has been there from 13 Dec 2018 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 9.68% since its inception.

charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund.
